title: CI Zero-Bypass Migration Report
summary: Migrated pcie2_publish_queue to CI-stamped schema. Added 8 columns + DB trigger that rejects any insert/update lacking a valid CI verdict with LEGACY_PIPELINE_DISABLED.

phases.detail: Added ci_version, ci_passed_at, ci_score, quality_fingerprint, semantic_fingerprint, rewrite_fingerprint, image_fingerprint, headline_fingerprint.
pcie2_publish_queue_ci_gate BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE, raises 42501 LEGACY_PIPELINE_DISABLED unless every fingerprint + ci_passed_at + ci_score>=60 are present.
46/46 publish-ready rows stamped with ci-v1.0-rescore-backfill (verdict carried over from prior CI rescore). 54 rejected rows left unstamped.
pcie2-publish-assembler now stamps ci-v1.1-zero-bypass + 5 fingerprints and rejects rows with composite CI score < 75.
